review_text: Booked for three nights. Entered the community family room and walked away itchy. Spent the night scratching. Wasn't sure what the problem was until the next day, re-entered the community family room and realised there was a bird lice infestation (could see them crawling on my skin). Approached "Tania" at front desk and told her about the lice. She said "ill tell the boys to get onto it again" (treating the lice). Disappointed to hear it was a known problem, I told her we would be leaving early. Also told her about how itchy I was and I would need antihistamines. She turned from me and rudely answered the phone and did not engage with me again (no eye contact, no nod, no "please wait while I take this call", nothing) so I left. We packed up our van and on the way out, I asked "Tania" if I could have a refund. Manager came out. I told her about the bird lice and my allergy to being bitten by the lice and she said "this is the first time I've ever heard about bird lice here" or words to that effect. She refused to give refund on the basis that we "chose to leave early". Totally disappointed with the service attitude of staff. Could have been better if they acknowledged my problem and offered some solution (ie chemist voucher or part refund).

Our very first stop after picking up our new caravan, and what a fantastic experience it turned out to be!

After being turned away by a few other places because they said our setup was too big 🤔, we were so relieved to arrive here and be welcomed with such friendly and helpful service.

The staff went above and beyond to make us feel comfortable and settled in, which really made our first trip in the new van extra special. The location is perfect too — close to the beach, shops, and everything you need for a relaxing stay.

Thank you for making our first caravan adventure such a memorable one. We truly appreciated the kindness and hospitality and will absolutely be back again soon!

The staff in reception were really friendly and helpful, the location is central and easy to find but the cabin I stayed in is very outdated and looking shabby. The bed was incredibly comfortable, so it helped make my stay alot better.
The curtain at the front door was mouldy, the toilet roll holder is stuck to the wall with brown packing tape and the couch is ripped in several places as well as being too uncomfortable to sit in.
Horrible. Outdated. So wrong. Overpriced. Yuck.

Absolutely fantastic place to take the entire family. Amenities and facilities always clean and available, plus staff live and drink on the premises regularly. Staff know the permanent resident that steals from the camp grounds every day. Plus they're always on hand to not do a thing to help you because the entire kitchen is based on an honesty policy. So if an entire week of your families food, alcohol, pans, soft drinks, milk,coffee etc and disturbingly every single sharp knife is stolen one night from your clearly sealed and labelled Green bags you have popped in the fridges supplied in camp kitchen just remember that the camera above the fridges is not used to help secure a thing.

Quiet park.
Stayed in a very basic cabin.
Clean, not bad.
Pool good.

We just needed a rest. Somewhere quiet and by the beach. This was the perfect park to do that.  Little village shops and pubs walking distance and spacious older style sites in park.   This is not a new renovated fancy cvan park. It’s more for those who need to get away from the hassles of work and enjoy a short break from the city and noise.  No surf beach, it’s  just a quiet soft white sanded style

Great location, ammenities, kids entertainment.
The caravan park is outdated, but location and services, and price beats all of that.
Great place to stat
Great location , affordable price and simple clean cabin
Not a bad place to pack your own caravan
Went for a look at prospective weekend getaway

honestly i was incredibly disappointed. this stay was a christmas present and i feel upset that they spent the money they did on this.
nothing bad to say about reception, they were helpful and friendly.
the cabin was the issue. rust, dirt, disgusting shower, all of it. i felt like i couldnt sit down on the couch. the shower is tiny and has the worst water pressure ive ever experienced i didnt feel clean after my shower.
the microwave switch was off when we arrived and we could not reach the switch to turn it back on without immense effort. the cabin had an odd suffocating smell that persisted even after leaving windows open to air out.
the aircon is fine and does its job but its hard to figure out and super loud.
they also left a disgusting dirty blue cloth in the bathroom, and the shower curtain rod left rust all over the bathmat.
i would not recommend staying in a cabin here. as good as the location is its not worth it..

Starting with the positives, the location is great and close to everything you’d wanna go to in Woorim. The staff were very helpful, especially with giving us directions to our cabin.

Unfortunately, the cabins are in very desperate need of renovating. Almost everything was noticeably old, there was a lot of rust (even to the point of staining the bath mat) and the sealing on the drain in the shower was really disgusting.

I struggled to find a parking space around our cabin. The paper they gave us said to park in our designated parking space, but it was very unclear what that space actually was. I ended up parking on the grass beside the side of the cabin since it was unclear.

The bathroom in particular was quite unpleasant and very small. I struggled to sit on the toilet or have a shower as there’s hardly any room.

For the price, i understand that it’s not going to be the most luxury spot in the world, but the cabin was rather unpleasant to stay in due to what I mentioned above.
Everything you need and nothing you don’t!

Quiet, within walking distance to Shops and Surf Beach local pub.
Highly recommend.
Very close to beach pub cafes shops

Excellent caravan park with plenty of facilities to make your stay enjoyable and staff are very flexible and HAPPY!!!! WOULD recommend this park as a great place to stay in!!!😄😃😀😅🤣😂🥰😍🤩❤️👌👌👌👍👍👋👋🎉🎊✨️🧨🎇🎆

We stayed for the weekend in our camper van and really enjoyed it, great value for money and the amenities were clean and the park was well looked after, the beach and shops close by.
I will add though, disappointed that the pool closed so early, 6pm  in summer…still daylight and opens as late as 8am.
I’m also thankful we were given a site well away from the huge birthday party crowd but they did quieter down at 10pm.
Great location close to the beach. Wonderful service from the girls at reception. A full holiday experience! Thanks guys.

Had a relaxing caravanning weekend away with friends. Although it was during school holidays, staff managed to have our two caravans next to each other. The facilities here are very well maintained, clean and tidy. The staff are so friendly and eager to assist. One of the BEST parks we have ever stayed at and will definitely will be returning to.
Awesome place to come stay with the kids for a holiday

Great stay! Been coming with extended family since late 70,s…. Close to Brisbane, beautiful beach, all the basic facilities up the road in Woorim shops … pub, surf club, butcher, baker, fishing, pizza, IGA and several cafes and coffee shops to chose from ….

I just travelled all the way to Bribie island holiday park at Woorim for only the weekend and the only reason we came here is because it had a pool and it’s near the beach its the middle of Queensland summer, scorching hot. After spending the afternoon here and enjoying only 1 hour in the pool relaxing after our long trip because the pool shuts at 6:00pm! it’s still daylight.

I wake up the next morning and the pool is Shut till Sunday afternoon. Now all we can do is sit in our tents in the heat looking at the pool or walk to the beach, that might I ad is bull shark infested. The lady wouldn’t even help by refunding a small amount of what we paid due to the huge inconvenience and literally ruined our only weekend away.

If I could give a 0 stars I would!!
Great caravan park.. well equipped Camp kitchen & recreation room, good sized pool.. Very clean and comfortable cabins.. thanks guys, we'll be back 👍👍👍

The ladies at check in are very friendly and welcoming. The grounds are very neat and tidy. The cabins are a little dated but everything works as it should and adds to the charm. Very convenient location to shops, beach and surf club. All within 5 mins walk. Highly recommend.
Everyone is very friendly and helpful. Felt very welcome. Everything is beat and clean. Eaily walk to shops, pub, surf club, beach.

We had a great short stay here. I wouldn’t have an issue staying longer. Although we had no children, it looks great for kids. Great, hot showers & wifi was welcomed haha. I would visit again no problem!
Great place to relax close to the beach. Well maintained and clean spacious camp sites. Great facilities to entertain children.

We stayed in one of the small cabins, it was very clean and comfortable.  The bed was comfortable. The people in the reception were very friendly. The proximity of the park to the beach and shops was excellent. The only negative I would say is the excessively bright street lights in the park.  I don't know what it is with a lot of caravan parks, the street lighting always seems to illuminate the caravans and cabins as well as the roadway.  Surely they could put shades on them to direct the light down.
Loved the location the staff super helpful. Were staying there for our wedding they had no issues with makeup artist or photographer coming on site for the bride

Cabins, tent sites & sites for vans. Great pool and camp kitchen. Walking distance to the pub, surf club and shops. Full laundry with washers & dryers available. Nice, tidy and quiet park. 100 m walk to the beach.
Just packed up and left, I seen an old man putting a needle in his arm in the toilet and blood on the ground .. disgusting. They won't refund me either . Stay away from this place.
Very uncomfortable... permanent residents here are a nuisance, nosy , lazy and drink all the time. Slamming doors in the toilet and spewing up. Gross and dingy place.

I would say it would have been more enjoyable place to stay, if we didn’t have to listen to the foul language and deal with the drunken parents getting leathered every afternoon behind us, letting their kids go feral til 9:50pm yelling and screaming with no consideration to anyone else. I guess, that’s the norm these days.

Great bbq area and plenty to do for the kids. I was only there for a wedding but the room/ cabins look great. Walk to the beach.
Nice spot

We had a lovely family gathering and celebration of my daughter's wedding. The staff were wonderful, friendly and accommodating. So close to the beach, great activities for the kids and memories to last a lifetime!
Amazing weekend! Great location for beach and cafes. Near the park for the kids and great games and sport area in the caravan park itself. We'll be booking again.
A clean and efficiently operated Caravan park. Close to beach, eateries, surrounded by trees and very quiet
We visited our family so stayed here. Was nice and comfortable
Expensive no pets

We really liked the park
Great location.

Camped here for 10 nights.

Friendly people, clean amenities.

Great location.

Will come again.
We will be returning again soon we had a great time at the Bribie Island Caravan Park, the staff were very accomodating and friendly. The park is situated so close the everything in Woorim.

We stayed here in a cabin that was quite dated but is was very warm.  The aircon drips outside so love the table and chairs away from the dripping.  The fridge is a good size and the bathroom adequate.  The pool needs renovating but still does the job.  We heard Big 4 might take over this park so it will get a make over, not sure where all the residents will go as the park seems to be 50% permanent folk in vans and pergolas.

This was a wonderfull caravan park. However was a little further out.  It was within walking distance from the Bribie island surf club which is well situated and provides great food.  The Woorim a beach is close by and there are some great bunkers a walk along the beach 6 kilometres return trek. Great facilities available including a camp kitchen clean showers and facilities.
Great little caravan park near water...very nice area to visit
Caravan site not great, but still adequate.
The toilet (near the pool) need a bit of work of cleaning but everything was amazing, my kids had so much fun, we will definitely come again

This isn't an island but rather a peninsula.

We used the spot for a night, and it was good enough.

We loved our stay at Bribie Island Caravan Park. We stayed in a kingfisher villa and it was super clean and tidy. The kitchen although dated had a cooktop Nad everything you need.

The staff at reception are just so lovely and we really enjoyed all the activities on site. Mini golf, table tennis, tennis, bowling. Lots of fun!

Great park close to the beach and some shops. Very clean toilet and showers. And fantastic facilities for kids our daughter even swam in the pool on a wet cold day haha. Very reasonable rates too. We didn't want to leave!

Triste.
Le bungalow n'est pas comme sur les photos. Petit lit, on dort dans la cuisine et le salon en même temps.  😵‍💫
La climatisation enfin chaufferette est bruyante sous la tête de lit et fait trembler le mur. 😠
La douche est petite et il faut se positionner pour se laver le corps afin de ne pas heurter le mur. Le sdb lui-même est hyper petit. 🥺
Le wifi (je ne sais pas s'ils savent ce que c'est) est une vraie plaie. Pas moyen de communiquer avec les proches. 😐Heureusement les galeries commerciales ont des wifi Free.
Passé qq jours c'est compliqué. 🥺
Vraiment rien avoir avec les photos .🥺

Lounge in unite needs updating
Bed so comfy

Staff were very friendly, the cabin's were a little outdated especially the couch.
Location to shops and amenities we're brilliant. I would stay again as the price point was very reasonable.
Will definitely be back, kids loved it. Good location,amenities,accommodation.
Lovely little park to camp in,  clean amenities and grounds. Well lit at night too. I'll definitely come back! Shops are a short walk away for anything you need!
We had powered campsites & they were close to the amenities which were spotless. The games room was very dated but still kept us amused. The staff were awesome.

I booked a cabin for the weekend it was so lovely and peaceful and friendly staff can't wait to take my grandbabies next stay I recommend staying here with the family or just a couple as it's in a great location just a stone throw away from Bars beaches and surf club

Tanya was absolutely lovely, very accommodating to us, our children & our grandchildren!|The park is a little dated and considering everything, very expensive, but apparently this was due to an event on nearby! $224.00 for 2A & 2C on a powered site for 2 nights in Woorim is the most we have ever paid for camping anywhere!|The pool and activities available for the children were great, ping pong, air hockey, mini golf, pickle ball & tennis etc.|Very handy location with everything needed nearby and the beach barely a 5 minute walk. Lovely stay, albeit expensive!
Freundliches Personal, hilfsbereit und ein super gelegener Platz. In wenigen Minuten am Strand und den Lokalen. Wir können den Platz nur empfehlen.
Simply a great location and facilities.

We stayed in the Oceania Suite and it was very spacious. There's a huge laundry and a pool with a playroom which is perfect for kids.| My favourite part was that it was walking distance to the beach and all the shops and cafes. Very convenient and would definitely go back.

A huge shout out to Toni and the team @ Bribie Island Caravan Park - Woorim! Toni made our booking process easy, worked with us in terms of negotiating how we were to make deposit and pay for our stay. With compassion and professionalism referred our need for an early departure to her management and arranged a credit for our remaining time against our next stay. But it doesn't stop there...the amenities were very well serviced and always clean. The pool fresh. The park staff were friendly and helpful and the Park was very well presented. I can't speak highly enough of our experience. And the local "long term-ers" we met were very accepting and kind. We will be back!

The park was very clean and tidy.  The staff were accommodating and very pleasant to deal with.  We stayed in one of the Kingfisher cabins and it was very clean and comfortable.  My husband wanted to take the mattress home with us as it was so comfortable.  All facilities within the park were also very well maintained and accessible to all.  The park was full on the day of our arrival and the sound of laughing children was wonderful to hear.  I would highly recommend this park to families of all ages.  And the only negative thing I could say about the park was that we had to go home.

Friendly staff upon checking in.
Great location close to The beach cafes, restaurants and bars Great location walking distance to everything
My husband and I stay in a villa had Everything we needed, shower good Bed was Comfy . Would definitely return for another holiday.
Lovely place friendly staff. Good price for cabin. Cabins could do with an  upgrade, but was ok for our 3 day visit.
I gave 1 star because they increased the overnight rate because there was an event on the other side of the island. $82 for one night.

Edit: November 2024- we stayed a cabin this time round & the rooms have air con, bunk beds which surprisingly are not too bad & a double bed. They even had shampoo, conditioner & body wash which was so good as I forgot to pack ours :p Love how EVERYTHING is walking distance, surf club, bars, restaurants, beach, iga, bws etc you don’t need the car unless you are needing a big shop which aldi is just a 5 min drive. If you want a nice affordable family weekend away. This is the place to be

Great location , great place for a family get away. With playground, swimming pool, basketball/tennis, arcade, putt putt, 10pin bowling as well as the jetty only 10 mins away. I was very impressed to see not just the standard ladies, gents and disabled but they had there very own junior toilet and a children’s bath. Would personally highly recommended this one over the one on the water.

First time we've stayed here and it was lovely.  It was easy to get our caravan onto our site and the location in park was convenient to the amenities.  The location of the park itself is great, short walk to quite a variety of restaurants, shops, post office and the beach.
The place was very clean and spacious.  Facilities were well looked after and clean.  Great place to stay
Always amazing, which is why we keep coming back
Beautiful, family friendly caravan park with nice amenities- pool, showers very clean, toilets, camp kitchen, laundry, play areas for kids. Walking distance to lovely surf beach.
Stated in a cabin for 3 nights was fine for a quick get away by myself could do with updating other than that finr would stay again
Love staying here ❤️
Un peu cher mais bon emplacement sur Bribie island
Was within closing times but was closed

This was a fantastic place to stay.  The staff at reception were super helpful and very friendly. Tent camping sites were well maintained and very convenient to amenities.
The caravan park was close to the beach, restaurants, shops and nearby parks.
So close to the beach and little shops. Everyone very friendly, great little cabins in a caravan park, great facilities.
Beautifully relaxed atmosphere,as well as great staff, I think it would be wonderful stay.

Reception staff was extremely friendly and helpful throughout our dealings with them, from booking right through to giving us early access to our unit's fridge to store meat before our late check in. Very accommodating.
Accommodation was sufficient for the 2 night stay, a little dated, but still had everything we needed. It was clean and well presented. The bed was a bit too hard for us...
Some of the permanent residents in the park makes it look a little shaggy and other have beautifully maintained homes... Facilities were all great, clean and tidy. Overall, a great little place for the price you pay.
Lovely little park, well maintained

We booked four sites side by side for three nights (one site was only two nights). My husband came down with gastro on the first night (5/9/2024) and we packed up and left at 7.15am the next morning so we didn't infect the whole park.||We contacted the emergency number at reception to advise them and we had to leave a message. Someone called us back about 1 1/2 hours later (I'd hate to have had an actual emergency). We asked if it was possible for a refund at that time and was told that normally there is no refund for leaving early but they would ask the owners. I followed this request up with an email the next day as I had received no phone call. I still had no reply to my phone request nor my email request until today (18/9). ||I called leaving a message to call me about a booking and my phone call was returned by Nicole. I was advised by Nicole that the company policy is that there is no refund if you leave early and there are no exceptions to the rule. I'd have had no problem with this except I had to chase them for a response, we left to save infecting the whole park AND our site was booked the same day that we left so they double dipped on site fees. ||Nicole argued that this was not the case. One member of our group was moved to our site which was on the end of our group of sites and they put someone else on their original site which was then in between the other sites booked. ||We weren't there long enough to actually look around the park to comment on the facilities but we won't be back due to the poor service and lack of refund when they had booked our site again.
Great spot right on the beach, clean. ample of room awesome activities for the littliies but don't forget to bring mozzie coils, aerogaurd any thing to keep the sand flies and mosquito's away.
We was in our caravan, bit found sites suitable and amenities clean.

We stayed in a self contained cabin for two nights and were very happy with the facilities, location and price. The kitchen was well equipped, the bed was comfortable and the cabin very clean. Even though the sites were really close together, the park was extremely quiet. Would stay here again.
Nice and quiet  the service was friendly the amenities were clean.
Quiet and clean, walking distance to woolim beach and local shops.
Expensive for what it is
Great location 👌
Good service and nice people living there.

We had a lovely stay here. The facilities were clean and nice. The camp kitchen area was really nice to hangout in.
The staff were really lovely and understanding of our late checkout.
It’s also in a lovely location with plenty of food places and some great stores.
Finally the price was fantastic, for a powered site we paid less than a lot of national parks we’ve stayed at that don’t have power and showers.
Highly recommend this for anyone looking to stay on the island.
If you’re looking for something modern and high tech it might not be for you but for people who don’t care about that, it’s great.

We are a mature couple and had a great stay in a cabin in the campground. It was comfortable, clean, good value and staff were friendly and helpful.|An easy flat walk to the beautiful beach and surf club or hotel for dinner. |We would recommend

Would not recommend staying here. Very dishonest ones that run it. We booked several cabins and caravan spots for a family catch up. We paid a deposit on each and received a receipt stating the remaining outstanding amount. The cabins were charged an extra $150 dollars each to what was quoted and on the receipt. They would not honour their written quote. They jacked the price up on the cabins that much they are not worth staying here. They are not very well equipped, no aircon in bedrooms, extremely uncomfortable mattresses (maybe slightly softer than the floor), only 2 coat hangers in the cupboard, damaged fittings, numerous cracked tiles , no heat adjustment on stove (it’s on or off, and when on it is only on high, no lower settings work, they are all high heat) not what you would expect for their new extortion prices. You could stay at a nice apartment or hotel for the same price.

It is a couple blocks from the beach. It is in the quiet side of the island. Location is only thing going for it but unfortunately doesn’t make up for the poor value accommodation and abhorrent customer service.

We will never again stay here - poor value for money and extremely dishonest customer service. Will not support businesses like this and hope others don’t either. Beware.

Blankets was dirty ,no soap, no face washers ,toilet roll holder broken ,cupboards old and dirty ,lounge was filthy.same with flooring ,Too high priced for the size of the tiny cabins receptionist was too busy on her mobile .
We just did a couple of nights camping. Grounds were tidy, bathrooms pleasant & clean. Good location close to everything. Wasn't overly noisy. Camp kitchen pretty good.
Cockroaches and bad beds and they don’t make the beds for you getting here at 2 in the morning and not being able to get straight into bed
Nice facilities. Great vibe. Friendly locals

This park was not our first choice, but since it had the availability we required, we took the plunge.  Didn't realize until we arrived that the vast majority of the sites are permanent and that petty theft is a problem in the park.  This was an unpleasant surprise.  Was also disappointed to get a phone call from park staff at 2.45pm asking if we would be arriving before 4.30pm knock off, which also meant that any hiring of mini golf/sports equipment was not available for the coolest part of the day.  The mini golf course was a token gesture.  It was covered in leaves with broken and useless equipment and the games room was also disappointing.  Not even a T. V.  We stayed in a Frangipani Cabin and although it was clean, tidy and had a working air conditioner, it was way too cramped for 4 people. The bed was an ironing board (although my husband disagrees) and the entire bathroom was squeezed into a space the size of a cupboard.  The shower, while so small it made it challenging to get to all the necessary body parts, had copious amounts of hot water.  I noticed on arrival that I had to put sheets on the bunk beds, which would have been fine, had I felt that I was already getting bang for my buck.  Even though a lovely patrolled beach, parks and shops are within walking distance of our accommodation, it's not enough to entice us to stay again.

I camped here staff were so freindly and helpful,nice clean park,great for kids, good clean amenities. oven never worked though only heated to 100 only good for reheated already cooked food but no other issues Ile be back with my son again soon.

Wonderful accommodation,  all that was needed, we had a small cabin for 2. Clean, good-sized fridge freezer for Xmas food.  Very family oriented, swimming pool, playground. Easy access to the beach for swimming and walks, IGA, local eateries, great skate park nearby also.  We had plenty of coffee/tea essentials complete with milk.  Linen was supplied and very adequate. We were very happy with this place as holiday accommodation and will be back in a few weeks.
Lovely  and quiet 🤫

During my work travel to Bribie,  I stayed in the 1 bedroom frangipani cabin. Apart from the new age floor boards,  the whole cabin was something from 1980s. Including the shower curtain  Cabin smelt stail, bed was incredibly hard and uncomfortable. Doors are so old ,  hard and awkward to lock.  To top it all off, last night of my stay, I  had the pleasure of sharing this luxurious cabin with a HUGE HUNTSMEN.  Nearly as big as my hand. No spray, in the cabin found a broom, no luck catching the fastest creature on the planet, after the 1st attempt,  I tried to be brave and lay back on the bed,  than it reappeared on the wall where the bed was. I decided to sleep in my car. That's where I am right now.
I honestly don't know what condition  I'll wake up in the morning . Never ever staying here again.
Great little caravan park. Sites a little small and cramped in. Facilities a little dated but prime location and friendly staff.
Older facilities but very pretty and comfortable. Lovely bird sounds and trees all around. Great place to stay.

Camped here at a tent site with our 3 and 5 yr olds. Thoroughly enjoyed our time here and very much looking forward to returning for another stay. Park is kept exceptionally clean, very well maintained gardens, fantastic facilities such as large BBQ area with its own herb, veggie garden. Heaps for the kids. Tennis court, putt putt golf, arcade, games room and really nice pool with shade up kids end. The park has a great retro feel, is kept in great shape, very clean, super friendly staff ( and even friendly permanent residents we met ) great location, so close to beach and shops etc. Wish there were more parks like this still around! I remember holidays at parks like this when i was a kid. My kids will definitely remember this place fondly! Thanks guys! 5 star all the way!

We camped in tents, partner, myself, 3 and 5 year old for two nights under $100.
Daughter and her partner camped in tent next to us.
Very quiet, nice flat powered sites, friendly staff, very clean maintenance staff always seen about the grounds attending to something, camp kitchen, plenty of bbq's, tables, jug, microwave, fridges etc available to use, hot showers/clean toilets, laundry facilities.
Kids had a ball in the retro feel arcade, small park and pool (shallow end shaded, great for kids).
Didn't get a chance to use the basketball/tennis court or mini putt putt course but next time for sure.

Hallo,
war mal zu Gast in diesem Caravan Park. Die Eltern einer Bekannten von mir, waren da Dauer Camper für eine lange Zeit. Der Park ist gut angebunden und erreichbar, fast direkt am Strand. Läden und Food Shops sind praktisch um die Ecke und bis zum Zentrum von Worim sind es auch nur ein paar Minuten.
Der Park ist nicht all zu groß und übersichtlich. Das Personal war sehr freundlich. Es gibt Plätze für Wohnwagen und auch ein paar Zelte. Die Waschräume und Toiletten sind zwar nicht neu und schon was älter aber trotzdem ganz ok.
Die Preise waren recht gut, dafür das der Park am Strand liegt. Mir hat es gefallen und wenn man ohne Luxus auskommen kann, hat man dort auch eine gute Zeit.

Previous visit was enjoyable. This time our site was hammered by bird droppings each night. Apparently park are aware of the problem and are trying different remedies but we didn't witness anything. Were not given any warning from park upon booking or check in either.
Good park love it

camped here with my son. Amazing set up. mini putt putt + a pool and tennis court.
amenity's are clean and good showers!
location is perfect! close to shops/pub and beach!
3rd time here and will be back again!!

Facilities are old, but clean, the park is very well kept, the staff are amenable..and the presence of picnic tables strategically located are a boon. There's heaps for kids to do, and the beach is only about 300m away.
Overpriced for sites....
Very run down & the amenities block was aged & disgusting

Non Council run park. Owners are welcoming and with a great phone manner.

The park is gate secured, mini golf course, pool and a very clean and open camp kitchen.
My powered site was $42 per night, which is quite reasonable being close to the beach.
They also have a reward scheme. After your 3 stay, it is 10% from then on.
Would recommend. The price mentioned above would be seasonal. The pub close by and the surf club have excellent menus.

Cute place, but very dated. Way too expensive for what you get. $49 for a tent, one night. Needs a lot of TLC. The workers were instead more focused on using a blower right in the camp area before 8 am. Then proceeded to use every power tool under the sun, including a circular saw before 9 am. Very noisy.
Nice location. Short walk to the beach. Reception staff were very nice!!! Small park, your a bit on-top of each other.
Workers smoking in ‘no smoking’ sections and right by the BBQ cooking area, we used both morning and night. My husband loved that it was a BBQ with a flame and not a hot plate.
What a fantastic little caravan park. So much entertainment for the kids. The toilet/shower block is dated but clean and powerful showers. Close to shops and restaurants.

Excellent caravan park with nice facilities, spotlessly clean and close to waterway with fantastic walkways and beautiful sunsets.
Friendly staff. Very close to club and walking distance to shops. Highly recommend!
